title: Die Lümmel von der ersten Bank - 1. Trimester: Zur Hölle mit den Paukern
actors: Hans Kraus, Gila von Weitershausen, Günther Schramm
plot: Collectable stamps trader Kurt Nietnagel's son Pepe recently transferred from a private boarding school to Mommsen gymnasium (classical high school), but is also already its king of pranksters. Latin teacher Dr. Knörz swears to ge...
